---
title: "Week 11: Seeing Patterns"
subtitle: "Chapter 18"
date: "2026-11-03"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

## Overview

Two full sessions on data visualization with ggplot2 and the grammar of graphics.

**Reading:** Chapter 18

## Key Concepts

- Grammar of graphics: data + aesthetics + geometries
- Bar charts, histograms, boxplots, scatterplots, line charts
- Faceting for small multiples
- Customizing for publication
- Choosing the right visualization
- Reading visualizations critically

## Learning Objectives

1. Create publication-quality charts with ggplot2
2. Map variables to visual aesthetics
3. Choose appropriate visualizations for different data types
4. Identify misleading visualization techniques

## Assignment: Data Wrangling [R] (50 pts)

Hand-code a variable for 30 songs, import and clean the dataset, join coded data, export as coding_data_clean.RDS.
